🚀 v31.2 - Update Bridge Fix

✅ FIXED: Native↔JS contract for update checking. Immediate feedback on version status.
✅ NEW: Support for Android 10+ MediaStore (Downloads folder).
✅ NEW: Robust TTS diagnostics and voice data installation prompts.
✅ NEW: Pinch-to-zoom support (50-200%).
✅ NEW: Automatic SMS interface hiding for WiFi-only devices.
